system_config.NEXUS_HMAC_SECRET: The cryptographic secret used to sign and verify payloads between Apps Script and the Python VM, ensuring requests are authentic.
system_config.GEMINI_API_KEY: The API key required to authenticate with the Google GenAI SDK for LLM-based metadata extraction.
system_config.NEXUS_VM_URL: The public HTTPS endpoint of your Python backend VM. This tells the Apps Script frontend where to send its webhook payloads.
system_config.drive_sync_interval: The frequency (in minutes) at which the background engine checks for new or modified files in Google Drive.
system_config.gmail_sync_interval: The frequency (in minutes) at which the background engine polls the Gmail API or Pub/Sub for new email threads.
system_config.llm_model: The specific Gemini AI model version used for text processing (e.g., gemini-2.5-flash).
system_config.triage_enabled: Toggles the Two-Stage Triage extraction pipeline for Google Drive documents. When disabled, falls back to Single-Pass extraction.
system_config.log_retention_days: The number of days to keep immutable audit logs in the Artifact_History table before automatically archiving or deleting them.
system_config.auto_color_sync: When enabled, the branding engine automatically calculates Euclidean color distances to sync hex values between Drive folders and Gmail labels.
system_config.batch_threshold: The minimum number of pending artifacts required in the holding queue before triggering the Stage 2 Enforce LLM processing.
system_config.max_retries: The maximum number of exponential backoff retry attempts for Google API and Gemini API calls when rate-limited (429).
